name: Fridge
description: Low income client is requesting for a fridge as his current one has spoilt. He has been going through emotional challenges in his life and is facing ongoing conflict which severely limits his cognitive bandwidth.  A donation of a fridge would greatly benefit him.  Due to his financial circumstances,  we are seeking support for donors to arrange transport of the fridge.

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Tanjong Pagar
contact.name: Norlizawati Binte Hamid

passiton.name: Two-door Fridge
passiton.description: Self-collect

name: Fridge
description:
The client is a 29-year-old single mother caring for her two young children, aged 6 and 2, both with special needs. She has recently moved into a rental flat.

Due to existing financial debts, she is currently unable to afford basic household furniture, including essential appliances. Support is sought for a fridge to help with proper food storage, ease daily caregiving demands, and support the family in establishing a more stable and functional home environment.

passiton.name: Two-door Fridge
passiton.description: Self-collect

name: Dryer
description: Client, F/26, is married with 4 young children (ages 2m - 8y). She is a homemaker and caregiver to her 4 children. The family stays in a 2-room HDB rental flat. There is high stress in this family - spousal conflicts, emotional & mental health struggles, irregular employment and income by husband, and developmental delays in oldest child. The family relies on SSO assistance for their basic needs. Currently, with their washing machine and dryer spoiled, they have to rely on laundromat services which is very costly for the family. These items will help the family in managing their finances and caregiving duties.

contact.org: Fei Yue Family Services SSO @ Taman Jurong
contact.name: Rachel Kong

passiton.name: Elba vented clothes dryer
passiton.description:
Elba vented dryer

Helping elderly owner to donate as she has just sold her property.

Pls note: VWO or client has to arrange for collection at River Valley at their cost.

name: wheelchair
description:
Mr Kwek is a single elderly, aged 73 years old living in a 1 room rental flat. at home, he uses the rollator frame to ambulate. 

in the community for short distances, he has loaned a wheelchair from a nearby senior centre to travel about. While he has a PMD, the PMD's battery isnt reliable and mr kwek would prefer having a wheelchair to move about in his community.

Mr Kwek would benefit from having his own wheelchair.
